groups.notes: Took G1 and made it more specific about crashes and bugs. Removed r0003 and r0009 because they're more about offline downloads which doesn't fit here. Found some extra reviews with crashes and slow loading to make it 10 total.

groups.notes: Combined G3 and G4 because both are basically about UI being confusing and hard to find stuff. Removed r0027 (privacy thing) and r0042 (just wants a feature). Kept reviews about cluttered interface and navigation issues.

groups.notes: Auto groups missed this completely. When I was fixing H1 I noticed r0003 and r0009 were about downloads not working offline, not really crashes. Searched for more reviews about offline/buffer/download issues and made a new group since it's a different problem.
